description: Routing-resolution fixtures for the /review skill (v9.0.0-alpha.1+). Single-dimension invocations resolve to a reference file; sweep invocations dispatch sub-agents — sweep fixtures use the <sweep:KEY> sentinel to pin that the router parses sweep mode correctly without trying to enumerate the N references that would be loaded by sub-agents. Composition validity for sweeps is also enforced separately by verify-router-migration.mjs.

fixtures.purpose: When a name exists as both dimension and aggregate, bare invocation hits the dimension.

Sweep mode with the architecture aggregate. Critical because 'architecture' exists as both a dimension and an aggregate; the literal 'sweep' keyword must select the aggregate dispatch path, not single-dimension routing.
Sweep with hyphenated aggregate key to confirm tokenization handles hyphens.
Unknown first token (not a dimension, not an aggregate, not 'sweep') should be rejected, not silently resolved.
No-arg invocation should render the menu, not pick a default.
